parameters.body:
=<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" 
xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" 
xmlns:web="http://webservice.econsig.bmg.com" xmlns:soapenc="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"> 

   <soapenv:Header/> 
   <soapenv:Body> 
      <web:gravarPropostaSaqueComplementar soapenv:encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"> 
         <proposta xsi:type="web:SaqueComplementarParameter">          
            <login xsi:type="soapenc:string">{{ $json.client_id }}</login> 
            <senha xsi:type="soapenc:string">{{ $json['client secret'] }}</senha> 
            <loginConsig xsi:type="soapenc:string">{{ $json.usuarioBmg }}</loginConsig> 
            <senhaConsig xsi:type="soapenc:string">{{ $json.SenhaBmg }}</senhaConsig> 
            <codigoEntidade xsi:type="xsd:int">1581</codigoEntidade> 
            <cpf xsi:type="soapenc:string">12345678901</cpf> 
            <numeroContaInterna xsi:type="xsd:long">123456</numeroContaInterna> 
            <tipoSaque xsi:type="xsd:int">1</tipoSaque> 
            <banco xsi:type="web:BancoParameter">              
                <numero xsi:type="xsd:int">104</numero> 
            </banco> 
            <agencia xsi:type="web:AgenciaParameter"> 
                <numero xsi:type="soapenc:string">1234</numero> 
                <digitoVerificador xsi:type="soapenc:string">5</digitoVerificador> 
            </agencia> 
            <conta xsi:type="web:ContaParameter"> 
                <numero xsi:type="soapenc:string">987654</numero> 
                <digitoVerificador xsi:type="soapenc:string">0</digitoVerificador> 
            </conta> 
            <finalidadeCredito xsi:type="xsd:int">1</finalidadeCredito> 
            <formaCredito xsi:type="xsd:int">2</formaCredito> 
            <valorSaque xsi:type="soapenc:double">500.00</valorSaque> 
         </proposta> 
      </web:gravarPropostaSaqueComplementar> 
   </soapenv:Body> 
</soapenv:Envelope>
